peers_no_whip_tip: No WHIP, click to add one
peers_sharelink_copid_tip: Copy Local Peer Share Link OK
peer_name_input_placeholder: Enter a name to help identify the peer
peer_name_input_label: If not filled in, the id will be used for display
peer_pubkey_input_label: Read-only and cannot be modified; it is the unique identifier of the peer
peer_whip_input_label: Signaling Connection address. When 'Always Connect' is enabled, this peer will always be connected
peer_whip2_input_label: Backup WHIP. To avoid losing connection
peer_tm_nowsc_label: Saves bandwidth, only uses P2P to send data, but may fail to connect
peer_tm_nowrtc_label: Can protect your privacy, but will rely entirely on server relay and consume a large amount of bandwidth
peer_ip4_input_placeholder: Enter 'auto' to automatically select an IPv4 address
peer_ip4_input_label: Many legacy systems only support IPv4, so this is needed. Generally, IPv6 is recommended
peer_ip6_input_label: Usually set when using a fixed IPv6 address. The IP range is 2001:00ff::/32
peer_psk_input_label: This pre-shared key is said to help resist post-quantum threats, but currently seems not very useful, so it is placed under advanced options
peer_ices_input_label: Used to establish direct public network connections
peer_updated_modal_content: The peer has been updated successfully
peer_delete_modal_content: You are about to delete this peer
